case_title: ZACHARY ASHLEY HOWARD VS. BENJAMIN PIYARATNE STOKES

docket_entries.description: COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $213.20 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT STOKES, BENJAMIN PIYARATNE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-29-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-29-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ZACHARY ASHLEY HOWARD APPEARED. DEFENDANT BENJAMIN PIYARATNE STOKES APPEARED. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-29-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOWARD, ZACHARY ASHLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STOKES, BENJAMIN PIYARATNE $9,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,490.00, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $4700 DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,700.00 FILED BY HOWARD, ZACHARY ASHLEY AS TO DEFENDANT STOKES, BENJAMIN PIYARATNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOWARD, ZACHARY ASHLEY AS TO DEFENDANT STOKES, BENJAMIN PIYARATNE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED WRITT FILED ON SEP-21-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT STOKES, BENJAMIN PIYARATNE
